title: villager sell spawn eggs
description: A mod that adds new villagers that will trade almost every spawn egg
body:
## This mod adds 4 new villager jobs that each sell spawn eggs.
Almost every spawn egg in game is now buyable.
The reason there are 4 villagers is to make sure you can buy all the spawn eggs without needing to hope the right one unlocks at the next level.


![villager trades. level 1: chicken and pig level 2: cow and sheep level 3:cat and wolf level 4:rabbit and donkey level 5: horse and llama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e93eb5445a1d7b27c05d4ed637146ed306f20a.png)

![Exotic animal farmer level 1: bee and parrot level 2:fox and goat level 3:ocelot and panda level 4:polar bear and camel level5:mooshroom and sniffer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7190532c5910ebf5b1b595b97fe210266c2fabf0.png)

![adventurer level 1: zombie and creeper level2:skeleton and spider level3:stray and phantom level4:witch and slime level5: blaze and enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6619b2d8d9b3876bb9adb1282eb1162379d4ea48.png)

![Aquatic animal farmer level1:cod and salmon level2:tropical fish and pufferfish level3: frog and squid level 4: axolotl and dolphin level5: turtle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f98a0f81e278798fe67b4542b7d0db8a199a2cc3.png)


The villagers all have a coloured hat do distinguish between them.
Want to make nicer textures for them? let me know on discord

Ideas for the future:
Requiring a mob drop to buy the egg to make it a bit harder
Different version for different price levels

let me know if someone is interested in these ideas and I'll work on it
you can reach me on discord: adindax
